title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.735 - Licenses or permits to be issued without charge
text:
8.735.  Licenses or permits to be issued without charge. — The blind vendor of each vending facility shall be subject to the provisions of any ordinance or order of the city or county in which the facility is located requiring a license or permit for the conduct of such business, but any such license or permit shall be issued free of charge to a blind person authorized to operate a vending facility by the licensing agent.
(L. 1981 S.B. 165 § 8)
